inputs.text: A striking Korean woman with burgundy red layered curtain bangs cascading past her cheekbones, captured in profile view on a 35mm lens. Environmental portrait, bust shot from shoulders up. She has a sharp V-line jaw and bright double-lid eyes that catch the moonlight with fierce confidence. Shot at a rooftop infinity pool under overcast skies, the city skyline blurred behind her. She wears a vintage denim jacket with cutoff shorts, one shoulder slightly turned toward camera. Soft diffused light wraps her flawless porcelain skin, styled with glass-skin makeup and gradient berry lips. Her expression is powerful and commanding, chin slightly lifted. Wind catches her hair mid-movement. Photorealistic, editorial fashion photography, no text, no watermarks.
